summary: Full E2E testing of RE'ACTIF PRO CV analysis and generation features. All features working correctly: homepage, login, CV upload, AI analysis, model selection, CV generation, downloads (DOCX/PDF), and preview panel.

minor.issue: Returns 400 if CV text too short (<50 chars) - this is expected validation

issues: Minor React hydration warning: button nested inside button - doesn't affect functionality

landing_page: Homepage loads with RE'ACTIF PRO branding
3 role access cards displayed (Espace Personnel, Employeurs, Partenaires)
dashboard: Dashboard shows CV upload zone with file input (data-testid='cv-upload-input')
Metrics grid displays (Identité Professionnelle, Métiers Compatibles, etc.)
'Mes CV' card contains CV analysis section
cv_analysis: CV file upload triggers analysis job
Progress indicator shows timer during analysis
model_selection: 4 model cards appear after analysis (classique, competences, fonctionnel, mixte)
Generate button shows count when models selected (e.g., 'Générer (2)')
Generate button disabled when no models selected
cv_generation: Toast notification '2 CV générés par Claude IA' on completion
download_buttons: 'Word' download button appears for generated models
'PDF' download button appears for generated models
preview_panel: Preview shows structured CV content (name, profile, experiences, etc.)
Word and PDF download buttons in preview panel

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: ParticulierView.jsx line ~1042-1064 has button nested inside button (View/Word/PDF buttons inside model card button) - causes React hydration warning but doesn't affect functionality
seed_data_creation: None - tests use anonymous auth and CV text upload
context_for_next_testing_agent: All CV analysis and generation features fully tested and working. The 2-step CV flow is verified: Step 1 (analyze-text) performs fast analysis and stores CV text. Step 2 (generate-models) generates selected models using Claude AI. Download endpoints return valid DOCX (Word) and PDF files. Frontend displays model selection grid with 4 models, generates on-demand, and shows View/Word/PDF buttons after generation. Preview panel shows structured CV content.
